name: GOLFTEC Grand Rapids
address: 2121 Celebration Dr NE Suite 150, Grand Rapids, MI 49525
about: GOLFTEC Grand Rapids is a data-driven golf instruction and club fitting center. Utilizing advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video, and launch monitors, lessons are personalized to analyze swing mechanics and improve ball flight. The facility offers a range of services from private coaching and practice memberships to custom club fittings with equipment from top brands like Callaway, TaylorMade, and PING. GOLFTEC's approach is centered on measurable improvement and personalized game plans, designed for golfers seeking to enhance their skills through technology-enabled training.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology like OPTIMOTION provides detailed swing feedback not available on the driving range
Custom club fittings use launch monitors and data analysis to add an average of 21 more yards off the tee
Personalized game plans and re-evaluations ensure continuous, targeted improvement

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, but you can also bring your own clubs. For a fitting, GOLFTEC's certified fitters will use their shaft optimization and launch monitor technology to match you with the best equipment from top brands.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The provided context does not specify a policy on outside food and drinks. It's recommended to contact the GOLFTEC Grand Rapids location directly for their specific guidelines.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The provided context does not specify a typical duration for an 18-hole simulator session. Time can vary depending on the number of players and the pace of play. Booking a session in advance is recommended.

faq.question: Is GOLFTEC Grand Rapids kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers junior golf programs and is accessible for young golfers. The use of technology like high-speed cameras and launch monitors makes it an engaging environment for juniors looking to improve their game.
